steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon after the blank tells you the rest of the sentence defines the blank. That definition: "constantly evolving network of channels and strips of land that change in size and shape." The word must mean constantly changing.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A. Immutable means unchanging or permanent. The delta constantly evolves — direct contradiction. Eliminated.

B. Unrivaled means having no equal. Nothing in the passage compares the delta to other deltas. Eliminated.

C. Sustainable means able to be maintained long-term. The passage is about physical transformation, not environmental durability. Eliminated.

D. Dynamic means characterized by constant change and activity. Substituting: "the Danube River delta is dynamic: it is a constantly evolving network..." — the colon definition confirms it exactly. D is correct.
